sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105180" key="tri/pteros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρίπτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having three wings,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρχή</foreign> Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg009:p.96P" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cra.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.96P.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
